typography.guidelines: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo' for all standard text headings, and ALWAYS use 'JetBrains Mono' for tickers (e.g., BTC/USDT), prices, order sizes, PnL, and timestamps. Use tracking-tight for all numbers to make them compact.

spacing_and_layout.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use border-collapse patterns. Widgets should have 0px border-radius to emphasize the institutional/technical nature. Grid items stretch to match heights. Avoid large empty spaces; fill them with data density or subtle grid lines.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard background shifts (e.g., hover:bg-[#1A1A1A]) with 0ms transition. Instant feedback is critical for trading.
motion_and_interactions.data_updates: Price ticks should flash text color (green for up, red for down) and fade back to white/grey over 500ms.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Keep standard UI animations to an absolute minimum (duration-75 or duration-100). Focus on data visibility, not flair.

surface_strategies.primary: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Make the grid visible. Use sharp 1px borders everywhere. No shadows, no glassmorphism.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid black background with a hard bottom border (`border-b border-[#222222]`).
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (`#0C0C0C`), 1px subtle border, sharp corners, no shadow.

components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts with customized sharp tooltips, straight lines (no curve/monotone), and strict axis formatting using JetBrains Mono.
components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary buttons are solid white with black text. Secondary buttons are transparent with 1px gray border and white text.
components.tables: Dense. Padding py-2 px-3 per cell. Hover on row: `bg-[#1A1A1A]`. Strict right-alignment for all numerical columns.
components.inputs: Sharp edges, dark background (`bg-black`), 1px border. Focus state: `border-white ring-0`. No soft halos.
components.tabs: Underline style or solid block style. No rounded pills.

icons.weight: regular or bold for active states
icons.usage: Use consistently sized icons (16px or 20px). Don't overuse; rely on text and color for data.

logo.description: Abstract minimalist geometry logo for the trading platform

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on black background for critical data. Dim text must remain readable (WCAG AA).
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every button, input, tab, and row must have a `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="buy-btc-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dense, multi-panel trading dashboard imitating institutional tools (like Bloomberg Terminal or Binance Pro).
Ensure the layout covers the full screen height (h-screen, overflow-hidden on body) with internal scrolling panels.

Include standard trading panels: Real-time Chart (central/largest), Order Book (right or side), Order Entry/Strategy configuration (side or bottom), Positions/PnL (bottom), and Header (nav, balance, pairs).
Use a 'bento' grid or strict CSS grid for the layout. Ensure panels do not overlap.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers, prices, percentages, and timestamps.
Strictly follow the color codes for Profit (#00E676) and Loss (#FF3344). Never use default green/red.
Mock real-time data using setInterval in React effects to make prices tick, order book update, and PnL fluctuate.
Use pure CSS borders to divide panels (border-collapse style). Avoid gaps between panels if possible, or use 1px gaps with a black background to simulate borders.

Use Recharts for rendering the real-time Multi-Timeframe trading chart (line chart is acceptable if candlesticks are complex, but use sharp corners). Add advanced indicators placeholders like EMA, RSI, MACD.
Add UI toggles for Paper Trading mode, Manual Override, Webhooks, and AI Models.
Add the provided logo and avatar to the header.
